hypothesis: If the novel single-agent extraction pipeline (marker-pdf-based structured extraction with markdown conversion and multimodal image processing) is applied to the nanozymes and chelate complexes datasets, then it will achieve higher end-to-end precision, recall, and F1 scores for the dataset-specific structured schemas than the baseline GPT models and domain-specific multi-agent systems, because standardized prompts and preserved document structure reduce information loss and improve multimodal integration.
